ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emission_data" (
  "msn" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the emissions dataset */,
  "yyyymm" TEXT /* Year and month of the reported emissions */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value of CO2 emissions */,
  "column_order" INTEGER /* Order of the column in reports */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emissions data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the emissions */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_sources table */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the emission_regulations table */,
  "data_quality_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality check for the emissions data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("msn", "yyyymm"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES emission_regulations ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Texas, California) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's characteristics */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "sql_query" TEXT /* SQL query used to generate the report from the emissions data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report template */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report template was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., EPA, Local Utility) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for inquiries about the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source (e.g., emissions, energy production) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the specific data accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the regulation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation became effective */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the regulation applies */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the regulation (e.g., federal, state) */,
  "enforcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation will be enforced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_regulations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "msn" TEXT /* Identifier for the emissions dataset */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* User who performed the quality check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_msn FOREIGN KEY ("msn") REFERENCES emission_data ("msn")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration log */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source being integrated */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date of the integration attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the integration was successful */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the integration */,
  "integration_method" TEXT /* Method used for integrating with the external dataset */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message encountered during integration (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
